languages.text: "Не слушай этих зашоренных дураков. Продолжай верить в то, что дает силу душе и телу, и делать то, что считаешь должным".
"Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."
languages.original_text: "Не слушай этих зашоренных дураков. Продолжай верить в то, что дает силу душе и телу, и делать то, что считаешь должным".

traits.locale_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right by you."
"Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."
"Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Just nod along to their lectures and continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul."
"Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right by you."
"Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."

languages.text: 「短絡的な愚か者たちの話を聞かないで。彼らの説教に頷きながら、心身に力をくれるものへの信仰は続けとけ」
languages.original_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Just nod along to their lectures and continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul."

languages.text: "O at gözlüklü aptalları dinlemeyin. Bedeninize ve ruhunuza güç veren şeye inanmaya devam edin. Kendiniz için doğru olanı yapın."
languages.original_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."

traits.locale_text: "O at gözlüklü aptalları dinlemeyin. Bedeninize ve ruhunuza güç veren şeye inanmaya devam edin. Kendiniz için doğru olanı yapın."

languages.text: “不要听信那些目光短浅的蠢货。继续信奉那赐予你身心力量的事物。做你认为正确的事。”
languages.original_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."

traits.locale_text: “不要听信那些目光短浅的蠢货。继续信奉那赐予你身心力量的事物。做你认为正确的事。”

languages.text: "Hört nicht auf diese bornierten Narren. Glaubt weiter an das, was Euren Körper und Eure Seele stärkt. Tut, was für Euch richtig ist."
languages.original_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."

traits.locale_text: "Hört nicht auf diese bornierten Narren. Glaubt weiter an das, was Euren Körper und Eure Seele stärkt. Tut, was für Euch richtig ist."

languages.text: « N'écoutez pas ces imbéciles. Continuez à croire en ce qui nourrit votre corps et votre âme. Faites ce qui vous semble juste. »
languages.original_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."

traits.locale_text: « N'écoutez pas ces imbéciles. Continuez à croire en ce qui nourrit votre corps et votre âme. Faites ce qui vous semble juste. »

languages.text: «No escuche a esos necios miopes. Siga creyendo en lo que da fuerzas a su cuerpo y a su alma. Haga lo correcto para usted».
languages.original_text: "Do not listen to those blinkered fools. Continue to believe in that which grants strength to your body and soul. Do what is right for you."

traits.locale_text: «No escuche a esos necios miopes. Siga creyendo en lo que da fuerzas a su cuerpo y a su alma. Haga lo correcto para usted».
